content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1/5.6.3 WARN — custom star gate routes ≥4-star users to a direct `itms-apps://…?action=write-review` link while diverting unhappy users to a private feedback form (App/RatingGateView.swift:17-24), bypassing `requestReview`; metadata also solicits "rate us 5 stars" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:1).
Pierre: Apple treats review gating and direct write-review deep links in place of the SKStoreReviewController/`requestReview` API as rating manipulation under 5.6.1/5.6.3, and it's a common rejection trigger. The code explicitly filters out negative reviewers ("unhappy users are kept off the App Store") — a textbook dark pattern — and the description's "rate us 5 stars" adds pressure language. Replace the gate with the system `requestReview` prompt shown to all users and remove the 5-star solicitation from the metadata.
